response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js skills, fitting the core requirements of the role. His experience with PostgreSQL (via MongoDB) and clean architecture is notable, though his exposure to Nest.js is unclear. His background in energy/geospatial platforms (e.g., GISCollective) aligns well with the renewable energy domain. However, his lack of direct Kubernetes/AWS experience and his senior-level background may raise questions about his fit for a junior/mid-level role.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scalable systems and clean software architecture
concerns: Lacks explicit Nest.js experience (key required skill)
Overqualified for junior/mid-level role (extensive senior experience)
